purpose: Single active list of current and future OpenClaw improvements. TASKS.md remains the historical lifecycle log.

items.title: Close CodeQL clear-text sensitive logging alert
items.reason: GitHub reports one high-severity CodeQL alert for secret logging on main.
items.next_action: Publish or merge the minimal observability.py fix and confirm the CodeQL alert closes.

items.title: Use clean worktree release discipline
items.reason: Local main is dirty and diverged, which makes broad staging unsafe for GitHub publishing.
items.next_action: Use clean release branches or temporary worktrees, then stage only exact intended files.

items.title: Fix shortcut_doctor JSON purity
items.reason: Automation parsers fail when --json output contains trailing report-path text.
items.next_action: When --json is used, print one JSON object containing summary, rows, fix_suggestions, and reports.

items.title: Finish Shortcut Governance Phase 2 PR
items.reason: PR #20 is mergeable with passing checks but still draft and review-required.
items.next_action: Final review, mark ready for review, then merge after approval.

items.title: Publish Loki and log-doctor repair
items.reason: The local observability repair is working and should be GitHub-backed.
items.next_action: Create a focused PR for Loki/Promtail/Grafana config and log-doctor classification fixes.

items.title: Repair auth-fail profiles
items.reason: Profile health affects routing reliability and quota-aware fallback behavior.
items.next_action: Audit failing auth profiles without printing secrets, then repair or quarantine invalid profiles.

items.title: Daily health report
items.reason: Jason needs one predictable health signal for gateway, Docker, model routing, logs, quota, and GPU state.
items.next_action: Define a read-only daily report command and archive output under D:\_outbox\reports.

items.title: Backup restore drill
items.reason: A backup is only proven when restore can be safely rehearsed and verified.
items.next_action: Prepare a read-only restore verification plan using the latest backup archive metadata.

items.title: Production approval broker
items.reason: High-risk production changes need durable approval targets and scoped execution receipts.
items.next_action: Centralize pending_action approval IDs for restarts, backups, workflow activation, and remote publishing.

items.title: Strengthen GitHub release gate
items.reason: Branch protection currently requires a narrow status check and should cover security/governance gates.
items.next_action: Require a consolidated governance/security check covering CodeQL, secret scanning, protocol audit, and Python self-tests.

items.title: Clean stale draft PR queue
items.reason: Old draft PRs obscure the true active roadmap.
items.next_action: Merge, supersede, or close stale draft PRs after confirming current relevance.
